nodes.label: AI as research assistant for clinical knowledge
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for culturally specific knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: I often use AI to research different clinical aspects

nodes.label: AI as conversational idea partner
nodes.grounding_span: more of a back and forth conversation. It's kinda like bouncing ideas off of a really smart friend

nodes.label: AI honesty and admitting uncertainty
nodes.label_negative: AI eagerness to please with fabricated answers
nodes.grounding_span: my biggest qualm with AI is the lack of honesty when you don't know the answer

nodes.label: Personal writing as authentic expression
nodes.grounding_span: It just feels a bit disingenuous to not do the writing myself

nodes.label: AI as co-evolution of human and technology
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to human thinking

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: It just feels a bit disingenuous to not do the writing myself

nodes.label: Trust and truthfulness
nodes.grounding_span: most humans would appreciate it more to just say 'I don't know the answer'

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for clinical research
nodes.grounding_span: I was particularly satisfied when researching borderline personality disorder and finding lots of useful information

nodes.label: Frustration with AI on culturally specific knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: AI does not have a dearth of knowledge in this area and was not very useful

nodes.label: Optimistic view of AI as co-evolution
nodes.grounding_span: I see it as a co-evolution of the human race and technology. I think it will enrich peoples lives

nodes.label: Concern about AI dishonesty
nodes.grounding_span: my biggest qualm with AI is the lack of honesty when you don't know the answer

nodes.label: Preference for human writing over AI
nodes.grounding_span: It just feels a bit disingenuous to not do the writing myself

nodes.label: Conversational back-and-forth reasoning
nodes.grounding_span: more of a back and forth conversation. It's kinda like bouncing ideas off of a really smart friend

nodes.label: Trust but verify approach
nodes.grounding_span: I also typically double check most everything that I get from the AI. Trust yet confirm
